beats.full_text: If a lost train of thought is familiar, this focus pattern needs a better reset.

beats.full_text: Trying to outrun ADHD usually makes the loop more expensive. More last-minute scrambling, more self-criticism for the same pattern. And less energy for the parts that need it.
beats.ssot_text: Trying to outrun ADHD usually makes the loop more expensive: more last-minute scrambling, more self-criticism for the same pattern, and less energy for the parts that need it.

beats.full_text: The focus-and-follow-through gap often persists because the brain's attention system responds to interest and urgency, not to importance alone. Pushing harder can look like progress while the underlying pattern stays the same.

beats.full_text: Try this. Write the next physical step in five words or fewer, set a visible timer. And start before your mind finds a better idea. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

beats.full_text: Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. A different operating system is not a broken one.
